title: codereview-P2 pass 3/3: Update 06-security.md:481 to reference new hash_32 instead of CRC16 for short-address binding
description: P2 finding in security considerations: Short-address assignment still says binds CRC16(EUI-64). Must update to consistent link-layer hash_32 per the CCP-15.8.3 change. Also check for impacts on DAD pseudocode and any Rust/Python impls of address derivation. Do not close project-LICHEN-9qjs until all 3 codereview passes filed and addressed.
